title: Tart Mellow Chicken Fricassee
description: A rich and savory dish featuring mellow chicken cooked in a tart and slightly sweet sauce, served with French onions.
instructions: Season the chicken with salt and pepper.
Heat 2 tablespoons of mellow butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned, about 5-6 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add the remaining 2 tablespoons of mellow butter to the skillet.
Add the sliced French onions to the skillet and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the diced tart apples to the skillet and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the flour to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Gradually add the white wine and chicken broth to the skillet, whisking continuously.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to medium-low and simmer for 2-3 minutes.
Stir in the heavy cream and cook for an additional 2 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened.
Return the chicken to the skillet and cook until heated through.
Serve the chicken and sauce over cooked noodles or rice.
